proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have a higher rate of objective_response than those not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.
Patients receiving treatment_sotorasib have a different rate of objective_response than those not receiving treatment_sotorasib.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have a different rate of objective_response than those not receiving treatment_olaparib.
Patients receiving treatment_osimertinib have a different rate of objective_response than those not receiving treatment_osimertinib.

analyses.result_summary: ORR=0.1739 on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 0.1640 off; OR=1.073, Fisher p=0.00332.
ORR=0.1695 on treatment_sotorasib vs 0.1687 off; OR=1.006, Fisher p=0.822.
ORR=0.1699 on treatment_olaparib vs 0.1685 off; OR=1.010, Fisher p=0.715.
ORR=0.1655 on treatment_osimertinib vs 0.1704 off; OR=0.965, Fisher p=0.18.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with egfr_mutation have a different rate of objective_response than those without egfr_mutation.
Patients with kras_g12c have a different rate of objective_response than those without kras_g12c.
Patients with brca2_mutation have a different rate of objective_response than those without brca2_mutation.
Patients with tmb_high have a higher rate of objective_response than those without tmb_high.
Higher pdl1_tps is associated with higher rate of objective_response (continuous logistic regression).

analyses.result_summary: ORR with egfr_mutation=0.1651 vs without=0.1695; OR=0.969, p=0.385.
ORR with kras_g12c=0.1693 vs without=0.1689; OR=1.003, p=0.943.
ORR with brca2_mutation=0.1619 vs without=0.1692; OR=0.949, p=0.487.
ORR with tmb_high=0.1819 vs without=0.1638; OR=1.136, p=1.14e-06.
Logistic OR per unit pdl1_tps = 1.180; p=0.00319.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among egfr_mutation-positive patients, treatment_osimertinib produces a higher ORR than no osimertinib.
Among egfr_mutation-negative patients, treatment_osimertinib has minimal/no effect on ORR.
There is a positive interaction between egfr_mutation and treatment_osimertinib on objective_response (logistic regression interaction term beta > 0).

analyses.code: fisher among egfr_mutation==1: osimertinib vs not
analyses.result_summary: In EGFR+: ORR osi=0.1637 vs no-osi=0.1657; OR=0.986, p=0.856.

analyses.code: fisher among egfr_mutation==0: osimertinib vs not
analyses.result_summary: In EGFR-: ORR osi=0.1657 vs no-osi=0.1711; OR=0.962, p=0.171.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among kras_g12c-positive patients, treatment_sotorasib increases ORR vs no sotorasib.
Among kras_g12c-negative patients, treatment_sotorasib has little/no effect on ORR.
There is a positive interaction between kras_g12c and treatment_sotorasib on objective_response.

analyses.code: fisher among kras_g12c==1: sotorasib vs not
analyses.result_summary: In KRASG12C+: ORR sotorasib=0.1745 vs no=0.1664; OR=1.059, p=0.421.

analyses.code: fisher among kras_g12c==0: sotorasib vs not
analyses.result_summary: In KRASG12C-: ORR sotorasib=0.1687 vs no=0.1690; OR=0.998, p=0.947.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among brca2_mutation-positive patients, treatment_olaparib increases ORR vs no olaparib.
Among brca2_mutation-negative patients, treatment_olaparib has no/minimal effect on ORR.
There is a positive interaction between brca2_mutation and treatment_olaparib on objective_response.

analyses.code: fisher among brca2_mutation==1: olaparib vs not
analyses.result_summary: In BRCA2+: ORR olaparib=0.1463 vs no=0.1679; OR=0.849, p=0.349.

analyses.code: fisher among brca2_mutation==0: olaparib vs not
analyses.result_summary: In BRCA2-: ORR olaparib=0.1706 vs no=0.1686; OR=1.014, p=0.597.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher pdl1_tps amplifies the positive effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on ORR (positive interaction term).
tmb_high amplifies the positive effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on ORR.
Among patients with pdl1_tps>=0.5, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with higher ORR than no pembrolizumab.

analyses.code: fisher pembro vs not, restricted to pdl1_tps>=0.5

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps (worse performance status) is associated with lower objective_response.
ECOG=2 patients have substantially lower ORR than ECOG=0 patients.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher nlr (neutrophil/lymphocyte ratio) is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower objective_response.
Squamous histology has a different ORR vs adenocarcinoma.
stk11_mutation is associated with reduced ORR overall.
Among pembrolizumab-treated patients, stk11_mutation reduces ORR (negative interaction with pembrolizumab).
Among pembrolizumab-treated patients, keap1_mutation reduces ORR (negative interaction with pembrolizumab).
Never-smokers have a different ORR than current smokers.

analyses.result_summary: ORR squamous=0.1737 vs adeno=0.1671; OR=1.048, p=0.0765.
ORR never=0.1638 vs current=0.1723; OR=0.941, p=0.113.

proposed_hypotheses.text: stage_iv patients have lower ORR than non-stage IV patients.
Patients with liver_mets have lower ORR than those without.
Patients with bone_mets have lower ORR than those without.
Patients with has_brain_mets have lower ORR than those without.
Patients with pleural_effusion have lower ORR than those without.

analyses.result_summary: ORR liver_mets+=0.1728 vs liver_mets-=0.1683; OR=1.033, p=0.334.
ORR bone_mets+=0.1734 vs bone_mets-=0.1678; OR=1.041, p=0.18.
ORR has_brain_mets+=0.1436 vs has_brain_mets-=0.1775; OR=0.777, p=6.12e-19.
ORR pleural_effusion+=0.1695 vs pleural_effusion-=0.1688; OR=1.005, p=0.881.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with lower objective_response.
Female sex (sex_female=1) is associated with a different ORR than male.
race_ethnicity is associated with ORR (chi-square test of independence).
Medicaid/uninsured insurance is associated with different ORR than medicare/private.
rural_residence is associated with different ORR.

analyses.result_summary: Per year age: beta=0.00051, OR=1.0005, p=0.668.
ORR medicaid/uninsured=0.1632 vs medicare/private=0.1702; OR=0.951, p=0.113.
ORR rural=0.1666 vs non-rural=0.1695; OR=0.979, p=0.491.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher cough_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with lower objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: fatigue_grade: beta=-0.0222, OR per unit=0.978, p=0.0402.
pain_nrs: beta=0.0013, OR per unit=1.001, p=0.776.
dyspnea_grade: beta=-0.0074, OR per unit=0.993, p=0.49.
cough_grade: beta=0.0123, OR per unit=1.012, p=0.258.
appetite_loss_grade: beta=-0.0104, OR per unit=0.990, p=0.352.

proposed_hypotheses.text: alk_fusion is associated with higher ORR (often targetable in NSCLC).
ros1_fusion is associated with higher ORR.
ret_fusion is associated with higher ORR.
braf_v600e is associated with higher ORR.
met_exon14_skipping is associated with higher ORR.
ntrk_fusion is associated with higher ORR.
her2_amplification is associated with different ORR.

analyses.result_summary: ORR alk_fusion+=0.1636 vs alk_fusion-=0.1692; OR=0.960, p=0.474, n+=2464.
ORR ret_fusion+=0.1739 vs ret_fusion-=0.1688; OR=1.036, p=0.673, n+=1018.
ORR met_exon14_skipping+=0.1765 vs met_exon14_skipping-=0.1687; OR=1.056, p=0.421, n+=1501.
ORR ntrk_fusion+=0.1515 vs ntrk_fusion-=0.1690; OR=0.878, p=0.51, n+=264.
ORR her2_amplification+=0.1622 vs her2_amplification-=0.1691; OR=0.951, p=0.502, n+=1467.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab effect on ORR differs between squamous and adenocarcinoma (interaction).
treatment_osimertinib effect on ORR is concentrated in adenocarcinoma (negative interaction with squamous).
Among EGFR-mutant patients on osimertinib, prior_targeted_therapy reduces ORR (resistance after prior TKI).
Among EGFR-mutant patients, the osimertinib effect is larger in those with no prior_targeted_therapy than those with prior_targeted_therapy (negative interaction within EGFR+ subset).

analyses.code: fisher: among EGFR+/osi+: prior_TT yes vs no
analyses.result_summary: In EGFR+/osi+: ORR prior-TT=0.1862 vs no-prior-TT=0.1605; OR=1.197, p=0.312.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Receiving a biomarker-matched targeted therapy (matched_therapy: EGFR+osi, KRASG12C+sotorasib, BRCA2+olaparib) is associated with higher ORR.
After adjusting for ECOG, age, stage IV, liver mets, albumin, LDH and pdl1_tps, matched_therapy retains a positive association with ORR.

analyses.result_summary: ORR matched_therapy=0.1665 vs not=0.1692; OR=0.981, p=0.663.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Most pharmacogenomic SNPs (snp_*) are unrelated to objective_response (counts of nominally significant tests do not exceed binomial expectation).
snp_rs1045642 (ABCB1 C3435T) is associated with objective_response.
snp_rs1799853 (CYP2C9*2) is associated with objective_response.
snp_rs429358 (APOE) is associated with objective_response.

analyses.code: loop fisher each snp_*; binomial test of count of p<0.05 vs 0.05

proposed_hypotheses.text: autoimmune_disease history is associated with different ORR (overall main effect).
interstitial_lung_disease_history is associated with reduced ORR.
chronic_kidney_disease patients have lower ORR than those without.
Among patients with autoimmune_disease, the treatment_pembrolizumab effect on ORR is altered (interaction).

analyses.result_summary: ORR autoimmune_disease+=0.1752 vs autoimmune_disease-=0.1686; OR=1.047, p=0.402.
ORR chronic_kidney_disease+=0.1746 vs chronic_kidney_disease-=0.1682; OR=1.046, p=0.214.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with higher ORR.
Higher platelets_k_ul is associated with lower ORR.
Higher alc_k_ul (absolute lymphocyte count) is associated with higher ORR.
Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with lower ORR.

analyses.result_summary: hemoglobin_g_dl: beta=-0.00347, OR per unit=0.9965, p=0.602.
platelets_k_ul: beta=-0.00010, OR per unit=0.9999, p=0.566.
alc_k_ul: beta=0.02483, OR per unit=1.0251, p=0.211.
cea_ng_ml: beta=0.00131, OR per unit=1.0013, p=0.288.

proposed_hypotheses.text: More prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with lower ORR.
prior_immunotherapy is associated with lower ORR overall.
Among pembrolizumab-treated patients, prior_immunotherapy reduces ORR (negative interaction).

analyses.result_summary: ORR prior-IO+=0.1725 vs prior-IO-=0.1683; OR=1.030, p=0.381.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a joint logistic regression with EGFR*osi, KRASG12C*sotorasib, BRCA2*olaparib, PDL1*pembrolizumab plus ECOG/albumin/LDH covariates, each biomarker-treatment interaction is positive and significant.

analyses.code: joint logit with all 4 interactions + adjustments
joint logit with all 4 interactions + adjustments
joint logit with all 4 interactions + adjustments
joint logit with all 4 interactions + adjustments

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within treatment_pembrolizumab=1 patients, higher pdl1_tps strongly predicts higher ORR.
Within treatment_pembrolizumab=0 patients, pdl1_tps has weak/no effect on ORR.
tmb_high effect on ORR is largely concentrated in pembrolizumab-treated patients (positive interaction).
Among treatment_pembrolizumab=1 patients, the positive PD-L1 effect is attenuated when stk11_mutation=1 (three-way interaction PDL1*pembro*STK11).
Within pembrolizumab-treated, stk11_mutation+ patients have lower ORR than stk11_mutation- patients.
Receipt of matched_therapy differs by race_ethnicity (testing equity of biomarker-driven treatment assignment).
Receipt of matched_therapy differs by insurance_type.
After adjusting for biomarkers, ECOG, age, sex, albumin, LDH, matched_therapy, pdl1_tps, and tmb_high, race_ethnicity remains independently associated with ORR.

analyses.code: logit with C(race_ethnicity) controlling for biomarkers/ECOG/labs
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted race effects: C(race_ethnicity)[T.black]: beta=0.006, p=0.918; C(race_ethnicity)[T.hispanic]: beta=-0.037, p=0.517; C(race_ethnicity)[T.other]: beta=0.051, p=0.588; C(race_ethnicity)[T.white]: beta=-0.079, p=0.119.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a final integrated logistic regression that includes biomarker-matched-therapy interactions, ECOG, albumin, LDH, weight loss, NLR, prior_lines_of_therapy, age, stage IV, liver_mets, brain_mets, bone_mets, STK11, KEAP1, TP53 — the strongest positive predictors of ORR are matched-therapy interaction terms and PD-L1*pembrolizumab; the strongest negative predictors are higher ECOG, weight loss, LDH, NLR, prior lines of therapy, liver mets and brain mets.
